data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding permissions for booking notifications.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that a teen can book while a parent receives notifications. However, the evidence provided does not include any direct API reads or state checks that confirm this specific functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario where the teen books and the parent is notified, there is no concrete evidence or API interaction that demonstrates this capability, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming that a teen can book while a parent receives notifications.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
